steps.description: In the "Input CT Volume" option, choose the Pelvic Volume.

sub_operations.description: Select input CT volume for pelvic fracture planning
sub_operations.question: In the "Input CT Volume" option, choose the Pelvic Volume.

choice_info.question: In the "Input CT Volume" option, choose the Pelvic Volume.

ui_guidance.title: Select Pelvic Volume
ui_guidance.instruction: In the 'Input CT Volume' drop-down, select the pelvic volume.

sub_operations.description: Run pelvis segmentation on the input volume

ui_guidance.title: Segment Pelvis
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the 'Run Step 1: Segment Pelvis' button.

sub_operations.description: Run fracture segmentation on the input volume using pelvis segmentation

ui_guidance.title: Segment Fractures
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the 'Run Step 2: Segment Fractures' button.

steps.description: In the "Untick any fragments to exclude it from planning" section, untick these segments.

sub_operations.description: Select which fracture segments to exclude from planning by unticking them in the segment table
sub_operations.question: In the "Untick any fragments to exclude it from planning" section, untick these segments.

choice_info.question: In the "Untick any fragments to exclude it from planning" section, untick these segments.

ui_guidance.title: Exclude Fragments
ui_guidance.instruction: In the segment list, uncheck any fragments you want to exclude from planning.

sub_operations.description: Generate the reduction template from pelvis segmentation

ui_guidance.title: Generate Template
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the 'Run Step 3: Generate Template' button.

sub_operations.description: Register and reduce fractures using the template and segmentations

steps.description: If further adjustments are required, tick the "Manually adjust a fragment" checkbox. If not, jump to step 11.

sub_operations.description: Ask user if manual adjustment of a fragment is needed; if yes, tick the checkbox and proceed; if no, jump to step 11
sub_operations.question: Further adjustments required?

ui_guidance.title: Manual Adjustments?
ui_guidance.instruction: Select 'Yes' if you need to adjust fragments, or 'No' to skip.

steps.description: Choose which fragment needs adjustment in the "Fragment" selection box.

sub_operations.description: Select which fragment to manually adjust from the reduction segmentation
sub_operations.question: Choose which fragment needs adjustment in the "Fragment" selection box.

choice_info.question: Choose which fragment needs adjustment in the "Fragment" selection box.

controller.prompt: If further adjustments are required, check the 'Manually adjust a fragment' checkbox. If not, skip to step 11.

ui_guidance.title: Select Fragment
ui_guidance.instruction: In the 'Fragment' selection box, choose the fragment to adjust.

steps.description: Manually adjust the position and rotation of the selected fragment.

sub_operations.description: Manually translate/rotate the selected fragment to adjust its position

controller.prompt: If further adjustments are required, check the 'Manually adjust a fragment' checkbox. If not, skip to step 11.

ui_guidance.title: Adjust Fragment
ui_guidance.instruction: Use the transform widget to reposition and rotate the selected fragment.

sub_operations.description: Apply the manual adjustment to the fragment

controller.prompt: If further adjustments are required, check the 'Manually adjust a fragment' checkbox. If not, skip to step 11.

steps.description: Click the "Run Step 5: Plan Screws" button.

sub_operations.description: Plan screw trajectories on the reduced fragments

ui_guidance.title: Plan Screws
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the 'Run Step 5: Plan Screws' button.

steps.description: If further adjustments are required, tick the "Edit Screw trajectories" checkbox. If not, stop here.

sub_operations.description: Ask user if manual adjustment of screw trajectories is needed; if yes, tick the checkbox and proceed; if no, stop workflow
sub_operations.question: Edit screw trajectories?

ui_guidance.title: Edit Screw Trajectories?
ui_guidance.instruction: Select 'Yes' to edit screw trajectories, or 'No' to finish.

steps.description: Manually adjust the position and rotation of the screw trajectories.

sub_operations.description: Manually adjust the position and rotation of screw trajectories

controller.prompt: If further adjustments are required, check the 'Edit Screw trajectories' checkbox. If not, the workflow stops here.

ui_guidance.title: Adjust Screw Trajectories
ui_guidance.instruction: Use the transform widget to reposition and rotate the screw trajectories.

steps.description: Click the "Regenerate screws from edited lines" button.

sub_operations.description: Regenerate screw models from edited trajectory lines

controller.prompt: If further adjustments are required, check the 'Edit Screw trajectories' checkbox. If not, the workflow stops here.

ui_guidance.title: Regenerate Screws
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the 'Regenerate screws from edited lines' button.

sub_operations.description: Untick the 'Edit Screw trajectories' checkbox to exit edit mode

controller.prompt: If further adjustments are required, check the 'Edit Screw trajectories' checkbox. If not, the workflow stops here.

ui_guidance.title: Disable Edit Mode
ui_guidance.instruction: Uncheck the 'Edit Screw trajectories' checkbox to exit edit mode.

controller.prompt: If further adjustments are required, check the 'Manually adjust a fragment' checkbox. If not, skip to step 11.
If further adjustments are required, check the 'Edit Screw trajectories' checkbox. If not, the workflow stops here.
